title: Spytime
desc: Anacleto, a former secret agent, is forced to come out of retirement and protect his son, Adolfo, when his arch-enemy, Vazquez, breaks out of prison and targets him

title: Redline
desc: Redline is an auto/action thriller that features an extensive exotic car collection Phantom Rolls Royce, Lamborghini Murcielago, Enzo Ferrari, Ferrari F430, Ferrari Scaglietti and two Mercedes SLR McLaren AMGs. The film follows a gorgeous young automobile fanaticize driver who becomes part of illegal drag racing competitions organized by exotic car fanatics.

title: Wrecker
desc: Two beautiful young women taking a trip through the countryside, are terrorized by an unknown driver trying to run them down in a heavy duty tow truck.

title: Haywire
desc: From Academy Award-winning director Steven Soderbergh of Ocean’s 11, 12 & 13 comes HAYWIRE. A Female Assassin covert operative is hired to various global missions to perform jobs which governments can't authorize. When the operation goes awry, she needs to use all of her skills & tricks to escape an international manhunt and eliminate the last remaining link of the conspiracy against her.

title: Universal Soldier: Day Of Reckoning
desc: John awakens from a coma to discover his wife and daughter were murdered in a brutal home invasion. Haunted by images of the attack, he vows to kill the man responsible: The fight pits John against Andrew Scott and an army of genetically enhanced warriors; meanwhile, he must contend with a Uni Sol in relentless pursuit.

title: Poseidon Rex
desc: While searching for lost treasure, deep sea divers unleash a monster that causes havoc and destruction not only in sea but also on land.

title: Tekken: Kazuya's Revenge
desc: Suffering from amnesia, a young man trying to discover his true identity is kidnapped by an underground crime organization and turned into a ruthless assassin
